### 感谢大家的支持！

# More interesting workflows, please visit [My Homepage](https://www.runninghub.ai/user-center/1898017693566418945/userPost?inviteCode=rh-v1315)

## You can also visit my [Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/169318349) and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTwMOik3XeMhPJ5vxOQCSlQ)

### Thank you for everyone's support!
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物全身的右侧视图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物正面45°视角特写
白色背景。生成图中人物脸部近照。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物正面45°视角特写
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物面朝左方的侧视图，
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物全身的左侧视图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物正侧45°视角的全身图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物全身的后视图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物面朝右方的侧视图，
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物全身的正视图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物后侧45°视角的全身图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：人物上半身正视图。
白色背景。将图一中角色改为图二中姿势：宽臀大胸女人上半身正视图。

默认/自定义提示词切换
开启状态为默认
白色背景。生成图中角色全身的正视图。

Guide: [Subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

## Model links (for local users)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)
- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [Flux2-Klein-9B-True-fp8.safetensors](https://civitai.com/models/2339723?modelVersionId=2631767)

- [flux-2-klein-4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/flux-2-klein-4b.safetensors)

**vae**

- [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── Flux2-Klein-9B-True-fp8.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

## Report issues

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud ship stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)
